chat.group.title: Up to {count} AIs can join a conversation
chat.group.hint: Hint: up to {count} AIs can be selected to join the conversation
chat.group.limit_error: Up to {count} AIs can join a conversation
chat.button.delete_all_title: delete all chat sessions for the current account
chat.input.placeholder: Type a message... (Enter to send, Shift+Enter for newline)
chat.toast.wait_generation: A reply is still generating. Wait for this turn to finish before clearing sessions
chat.toast.no_session_id: No current session id to copy
chat.confirm.delete_all_sessions: Delete all chat sessions for the current account? The current list shows {count} sessions; older sessions will also be deleted. This cannot be undone.
routing.title: Task Routing
routing.tasks.chat.help: Handles user conversation and entity tagging. Use a stronger model.
routing.tasks.expand.help: Extracts dense nouns and intent hints from the latest user message.
routing.tasks.pipeline.help: Splits, summarizes, and repairs memory graph data in the background.
routing.tasks.compress.help: Compresses long conversation history into a dense chronology.
routing.tasks.distill.help: Extracts long-term traits and values from episodic memories.
routing.tasks.ep_fuse.help: Merges related episodic memories into a denser overview.
routing.tasks.profile.help: Extracts user facts and preferences from conversation.
routing.tasks.persona_sync.help: Batch-analyzes conversation fragments and updates persona evolution.
routing.tasks.persona_seed.help: Extracts 3-5 root traits when a new character is created. Defaults to chat routing.
routing.tasks.background_gather.help: Summarizes Tavily search results into proactive topics.
routing.tasks.character_gen.help: Expands a short description into a full character prompt and indicators.
routing.tasks.router.help: Detects tool intent and produces transition speech. Prefer a fast lightweight model.
routing.tasks.group_router.help: Selects the next speaker in multi-AI group chat. Defaults to chat routing.
routing.tasks.translate.help: Translates character replies into the TTS target language. Defaults to chat routing.
routing.tasks.browser.help: Runs multi-step browser automation tasks. Prefer a function-calling capable model.
settings.title: ⚙️ System Settings
settings.ui_locale.help: This is currently a system-wide setting shared by static dashboard and Streamlit pages.
routing.streamlit.title: 🔀 Task Routing
register.title: Create Account
register.hint: Username must be 3-32 characters and may only contain letters, numbers, underscores, and hyphens. Password must be at least 6 characters.
register.has_account_html: Already have an account? Log in
profile.title: Profile Settings
profile.password_updated: Password updated. Please log in again.
profile.ui_locale_hint_admin: This is currently a system-wide UI language shared by all users and dashboard/Streamlit pages.
profile.ui_locale_hint_user: UI language is currently controlled by the system-wide setting. This area is reserved for future personal language preferences.
profile.locale_admin_only: Only admins can change the UI language for now.
users.title: User Accounts
users.hint: Account deletion is a test cleanup tool. It removes the account, login attempts, conversations, profile, memory, and topic cache. This cannot be undone and requires typing the full username to confirm.
users.reset_prompt: Enter a new password for {username} (at least 6 characters)
users.reset_done: Password reset. Existing sessions were invalidated.
users.delete_prompt: Deleting {username} will remove the account and this user's data. Type the full username to confirm:
users.confirm_mismatch: Username confirmation did not match. Canceled.
bots.title: Bot Management
bots.discord_hint: Discord requires Message Content Intent in the Developer Portal. In servers, it only responds to mentions or replies.
prompts.title: Prompt Management
prompts.reset_all_confirm: Reset ALL prompts to defaults? This cannot be undone.
prompts.meta.background_topic.label: Background Topic
prompts.meta.background_topic.descriptio: Generates a natural topic opener from web search results.
prompts.meta.browser_agent_system.label: Browser Agent System Prompt
prompts.meta.browser_agent_system.descri: System prompt for the Browser subagent LLM loop, including agent-browser CLI operating guidance.
prompts.meta.character_generate.label: Character Generation
prompts.meta.character_generate.descript: Generates a complete AI character configuration from a user description.
prompts.meta.chat_speech_instruction_no_: Reply-field instructions for plain text replies. The speech field is handled by a separate translation subagent.
prompts.meta.chat_speech_instruction_tts: Speech/reply field instructions used when tts_language is configured.
prompts.meta.chat_system_suffix.label: Chat System Suffix
prompts.meta.chat_system_suffix.descript: Rules appended after character settings: dynamic rules, memory injection, mental-state evaluation, and output format constraints.
prompts.meta.core_distill.label: Core Distillation
prompts.meta.core_distill.description: Distills user profile and deeper traits from episodic memories.
prompts.meta.core_fusion.label: Core Fusion
prompts.meta.core_fusion.description: Merges two similar core memories into a single fact.
prompts.meta.dialogue_compress.label: Dialogue Compression
prompts.meta.dialogue_compress.descripti: Compresses older conversation into an objective event summary for a single session.
Injects the previous turn's emotional state to preserve character emotional continuity.
prompts.meta.environment_context_block.d: Injects dynamic environment context before the user message, such as time and SU private-face weather.
prompts.meta.episodic_overview.label: Episodic Overview
prompts.meta.episodic_overview.descripti: Summarizes merged historical dialogue into a single episodic overview.
prompts.meta.group_followup_user.label: Group Follow-up User Instruction
prompts.meta.group_followup_user.descrip: Temporary user control appended during bot-to-bot follow-up. It is not written to the conversation database.
prompts.meta.group_participants_block.de: Injects the multi-AI participant roster into the final chat system prompt.
prompts.meta.group_router_system.label: Group Router
prompts.meta.group_router_system.descrip: Decides the next AI speaker in a group conversation, or stops and waits for the user.
prompts.meta.history_compress.label: History Compression
prompts.meta.history_compress.descriptio: Compresses multiple historical conversation segments into a chronology.
prompts.meta.memory_pipeline.label: Memory Pipeline
prompts.meta.memory_pipeline.description: Extracts structured memory blocks from the latest conversation.
prompts.meta.opening_penalty_instruction: Adds dynamic limits when a character's recent reply openings repeat too often.
prompts.meta.opening_penalty_retry.label: Opening Penalty Retry
prompts.meta.opening_penalty_retry.descr: One-shot retry instruction when the model still starts with a suppressed opening.
prompts.meta.query_expand.label: Query Expansion
prompts.meta.query_expand.description: Expands the latest user question into retrieval tags for memory vector search.
prompts.meta.router_system.label: Router Agent
prompts.meta.router_system.description: Analyzes user intent and decides whether external tools should be called. Calls tools only and emits no text.
prompts.meta.tool_thinking_speech.label: Tool Thinking Speech
prompts.meta.tool_thinking_speech.descri: Transition speech pushed immediately after tool routing is triggered.
prompts.meta.tts_speech_translate.label: TTS Speech Translation
prompts.meta.tts_speech_translate.descri: Independent TTS translation subagent that precisely translates reply text into the target spoken language.
prompts.meta.user_facts_extract.label: User Facts Extraction
prompts.meta.user_facts_extract.descript: Extracts objective facts and explicit declarations about the user from conversation.
prompts.meta.user_identity_block.label: User Identity Block
prompts.meta.user_identity_block.descrip: Injects the transient human display name before the latest user message without writing it to the database.
persona_tree.node_empty: Click a node to inspect it
log_viewer.drop_title: Drop a JSONL log file here
log_viewer.confirm_clear: Clear all log records? This cannot be undone.
log_viewer.empty_api: Log Viewer automatically loaded runtime/llm_trace.jsonl, but the file is empty or has no valid records.
log_viewer.reload_unsupported: This browser cannot automatically reload the file. Drop the file again.
log_viewer.parse_failed: No valid JSON lines could be parsed
log_viewer.debug_context: debug log_context (not sent to the LLM)
db_viewer.title: 🗄️ Memory DB Viewer
db_viewer.drop_sub: or click to choose a file
db_viewer.sql_placeholder: Enter a custom SQL query... (for example SELECT * FROM memory_blocks WHERE encounter_count > 2)
db_viewer.reload_unsupported: This browser cannot automatically reload the file. Drop the file again.
db_viewer.query_no_result: Query completed with no returned rows
prompts.streamlit.title: 📝 Prompt Management
prompts.streamlit.caption: Manage all LLM prompt templates in one place. Changes take effect immediately without restart.
prompts.streamlit.reset_all_done: All prompts were reset to built-in defaults.
prompts.streamlit.same_as_default: Content matches the default, so the custom override was removed.
prompts.streamlit.missing_warning: ⚠️ Missing placeholders detected: {missing}. This may cause runtime errors. Save anyway?
bots.streamlit.title: 🤖 Bot Management
bots.streamlit.caption: Manage Telegram / Discord bot tokens and character bindings. Discord requires Message Content Intent in the Developer Portal.
bots.streamlit.bot_id_help: 3-64 characters; letters, numbers, underscores, and hyphens only.
bots.streamlit.discord_hint: In Discord guilds, the bot only responds to mentions or replies by default. DMs are answered directly.
log_viewer.streamlit.title: 📋 LLM Log Viewer
log_viewer.streamlit.no_data: No log data yet. Run a conversation or generate test data first, then check again.
log_viewer.streamlit.no_matches: No records match the current filters.
db_manager.streamlit.title: 🧠 Memory Database
db_manager.streamlit.threshold_info: Current consolidation sensitivity: {value}. Lower values trigger broader associations.
db_manager.streamlit.no_clusters: 💤 No repeated topics need consolidation right now.
db_manager.streamlit.consolidate_started: Consolidation started. Found {count} topic clusters for background processing.
db_manager.streamlit.preference_info: Aggregates potential preference tags from memory blocks and promotes converged preferences to the long-term user profile.
db_manager.streamlit.preference_promoted: Found {promoted} qualified preferences and promoted {written} to the user profile.
db_manager.streamlit.preference_none: No preference tags reached the threshold.
db_manager.streamlit.inspect_caption: Inspect the runtime memory DB. Delete actions are enabled only in the maintenance tools area. Profile is per-user and not bound to a character.
db_manager.streamlit.maintenance_help: When enabled, chat, persona sync, background topic gathering, and memory write entry points are paused. Use this with a local DB editor or to delete bad generated data.
db_manager.streamlit.maintenance_update_: Failed to update DB edit mode: {message}
db_manager.streamlit.maintenance_active_: DB edit mode is active. After external DB changes, reload the runtime cache.
db_manager.streamlit.drop_legacy_caption: Only allowlisted legacy tables can be dropped. Arbitrary SQL is not available.
db_manager.streamlit.profile_scope_note: Profile queries use only user_id + visibility and do not use character_id.
db_manager.streamlit.delete_warning: This deletes runtime DB content directly and reloads the cache. Confirm the scope and selected row first.
streamlit.login.title: MemoriaCore Admin
streamlit.login.caption: The Streamlit admin console requires a separate login. HttpOnly cookies from /static/login.html are not available to Streamlit's Python requests.
streamlit.login.first_admin_hint: If this is the first run and no admin account exists yet, create the first account at {url}. The first account automatically becomes admin.
streamlit.login.bypass_disabled: This feature is disabled or only allowed locally
streamlit.error.backend_down: FastAPI backend is not running. Start port 8088 first.
streamlit.nav.label: Navigation
